urdu transliteration text: Tum To Maqtal Main Basar Raat Karoge Baba
english translation text: You will spend the night lying on the battlefield, O Father

urdu transliteration text: Kab Sakina Se Mulaqat Karoge Baba
english translation text: When will you meet Sakina again, O Father?

urdu transliteration text: Baba Jis Waqt Bandha Hoga Rasan Main Yeh Gala
english translation text: O Father, When in ropes this neck will be tied

urdu transliteration text: Aur Neze Pe Tera Sir Bhi Karega Giriya
english translation text: And upon the lance your head shall cry

urdu transliteration text: Mujhse Is Haal Main Kya Baat Karoge Baba
english translation text: How in that state will you talk to me?

urdu transliteration text: Tum To Maqtal Main Basar Raat Karoge Baba
english translation text: You will spend the night lying on the battlefield, O Father

urdu transliteration text: Mujhko Maaloom Hai Ab Ghar Na Kabhi Jaoongi
english translation text: I know that I shall never return home

urdu transliteration text: Gutke Zindaan Ke Andhere Hi Main, Marjaoongi
english translation text: In the darkness of the dungeons shall I suffocate and die

urdu transliteration text: Mere Bin Kaise Basar Raat Karoge Baba
english translation text: But how, without me, shall you spend your night?

urdu transliteration text: Tum To Maqtal Main Basar Raat Karoge Baba
english translation text: You will spend the night lying on the battlefield, O Father

urdu transliteration text: Baba Yeh Shimr Toh Rone Bhi Nahi Dega Mujhe
english translation text: Father, this Shimr will not allow me to cry

urdu transliteration text: Neend Aayegi Toh Sone Bhi Nahi Deega Mujhe
english translation text: Nor to slumber when I am drowsy

urdu transliteration text: Dil Pe Mehsoos Yeh Sadmaat Karoge Baba
english translation text: In your heart will you share this grief, O Father

urdu transliteration text: Tum To Maqtal Main Basar Raat Karoge Baba
english translation text: You will spend the night lying on the battlefield, O Father

urdu transliteration text:
Amaa Kehti Hai Ke Asghar Bhi Na Aab Aayega
Mother says that Asghar shall never return
Shab Ki Tariqi Main Bhaya Mera Ghabrayega
english translation text: But in the darkness of the night will my brother take fright

urdu transliteration text: Door Kab Gham Ke Khayalaat Karoge Baba
english translation text: When will you alleviate this sorrow, Father?

urdu transliteration text: Tum To Maqtal Main Basar Raat Karoge Baba
english translation text: You will spend the night lying on the battlefield, O Father

urdu transliteration text: Nauha Rehan Sakina Ka Sare Maqtal Tha
english translation text: O Rehan! This was Sakina’s elegy in the midst of the battlefield

urdu transliteration text: Gham Se Fatta Hai Sakina Ka Kaleja Baba
english translation text: Grief has torn my heart asunder, O Father

urdu transliteration text: Apni Yaadein Bhi Mere Saath Karoge Baba
english translation text: Share your memories with me, O Father

urdu transliteration text: Tum To Maqtal Main Basar Raat Karoge Baba
english translation text: You will spend the night lying on the battlefield, O Father
